expectations.text: Bram Hendriks and/or Aisha Khan scored highest (8-10)
expectations.evidence: No numeric scores; tier labels only.

expectations.text: Every listed stakeholder has a relevancy score from 1 to 10
Every listed stakeholder has a written rationale naming the relevance axis
Stakeholders are ordered by relevancy score, highest first
expectations.evidence: Grouped by prose tiers, not score.

expectations.text: No fabricated people outside the six synthetic-data entries
expectations.evidence: An 'Also pull in' section lists Maria Oliveira, Jonas Bakker, Hannah Schulz et al. as people to engage — surfacing unprofiled names as actionable stakeholders.
